summary: Initial generate-mode test run for Manrique Importadora PWA. Created full test suite covering backend APIs (auth, products, quotes, users, metrics) and frontend flows (login, admin dashboard, admin CRUD, employee quoter, golden-path journey). All 28 backend tests and 35 frontend E2E tests pass.
seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data created. Test data (products, users) created during tests is cleaned up via API DELETE calls in afterEach or within test bodies.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full test suite established. 4 spec files in /app/tests/e2e/ covering auth, admin dashboard metrics, admin product/user CRUD, employee quoter flow, and golden-path journeys. 3 pytest files in /app/backend/tests/ covering auth, products/quotes, users. App has 57+ products, admin/admin123 and empleado1/emp123 users. Price logic: qty 1-11 → P3 (Unidad), qty 12+ → P2 (Mayor), bulk toggle → P1 (Bulto). All tests passing as of this run.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Two test spec issues were fixed during development: (1) price label test used wrong text 'P3' instead of 'Unidad (1-11)'; (2) 'Bulto' text in quoter resolves to 2 elements (label + badge), fixed with .nth(1) to target the price badge.
